metadata.description: Portable Claude Code skill repo -- core identity, workflow enhancements, and utility skills

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: PAI core infrastructure -- personas, LAWs, rules, and project templates

plugins.name: skippy-dev
plugins.description: Development workflow enhancements -- context awareness, reconciliation, task rigor, plan boundaries, state consistency

plugins.name: add-todo
plugins.description: Scope-aware todo/idea capture - routes to project or global store

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Browser automation via agent-browser MCP and browse CLI

plugins.name: check-todos
plugins.description: Unified todo checker - shows project todos and global ideas in a single list

plugins.name: correct
plugins.description: Add corrections to appropriate docs when Claude repeats mistakes

plugins.name: deploy-service
plugins.description: Deploy a new service to LXC with nginx proxy and DNS setup

plugins.name: excalidraw
plugins.description: Generate Excalidraw diagrams from natural language using Mermaid pipeline

plugins.name: fabric
plugins.description: Process content through Fabric AI patterns - YouTube, URLs, and text

plugins.name: session-wrap
plugins.description: End-of-session workflow - session file, history, briefing update, commit

plugins.name: update-todo
plugins.description: Update any todo or idea - progress notes, complete, defer, or drop

plugins.name: vaultwarden
plugins.description: Fast credential lookup via vaultwarden-secrets MCP
